prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 55.2 kg; Height 163.7 cm; BMI 20.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 112/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 164mg/dL; 9 months ago 201mg/dL; 6 months ago 194mg/dL; 3 months ago 178mg/dL; current 187mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.1kg; 9 months ago 53.3kg; 6 months ago 54.2kg; 3 months ago 53.2kg; current 55.2kg), Height (12 months ago 163.7cm; 9 months ago 163.7cm; 6 months ago 163.7cm; 3 months ago 163.7cm; current 163.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 112mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 74mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 85U/L; 9 months ago 87U/L; 6 months ago 88U/L; 3 months ago 88U/L; current 83U/L), AST (12 months ago 98U/L; 9 months ago 100U/L; 6 months ago 107U/L; 3 months ago 98U/L; current 104U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.5mg/dL; current 1.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 79mg/g; 9 months ago 110mg/g; 6 months ago 94mg/g; 3 months ago 132mg/g; current 123mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 95mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 103mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 34mg/dL; 9 months ago 34mg/dL; 6 months ago 35mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 109mg/dL; 9 months ago 105mg/dL; 6 months ago 123mg/dL; 3 months ago 125mg/dL; current 116mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.7g/dL; 9 months ago 11.6g/dL; 6 months ago 11.6g/dL; 3 months ago 12.4g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.34 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
